Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.

Return to Help Index
]
23.5 Ship Command
True
ship
command
consists in giving all verbal
orders
. As you
speak
, your
executive officer confirms the order and translates it into specific
commands
to the
crew
. These are words you speak.
SAY
them.
Movement
Direction
/Course      Docking/
Harbours

ALL STOP                   COURSE dir            CAST OFF or CASTOFF
MAN THE OARS               TURN [TO] dir         DOCK direction
STRIKE|REEF [THE]

BRING HER TO dir      WEIGH|RAISE [THE] ANCHOR
